response.overview: 11 months, 25,000 miles, 8 ferries and one sore nose. I never arranged to meet anyone, just turned up when the chart looked good and filmed whoever was there at the time.  It doesn't matter if your a weekend warrior, have given up loads for it or are living on the verges waiting for a view...were all after the same thing to varying degrees. We have it good on our own doorstep, its just a matter of patience.
response.tagline: It was gonna happen whether there was a camera there or not
response.title: The Elusive
